name: Weight Watchers Oven "Fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut potatoes into 3" x 1/2-inch wedges.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F.
3. Spray a nonstick baking pan with non-stick spray.
4. Combine all ingredients except the potatoes.
5. Toss the potatoes in the mixture to coat thoroughly. (Suggestion: Put the potatoes in a gallon-sized plastic bag, press out air, seal, and toss.)
6. Place the potatoes on the prepared baking sheet.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes, turning over after 5 minutes.
